# polaris_catalog_role_assignment (Resource)

Assigns a catalog role to a Polaris principal role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "polaris_principal_role" "data_engineer" {
  name = "data-engineer"
}

resource "polaris_catalog_role" "reader" {
  catalog = "prod"
  name    = "reader"
}

resource "polaris_catalog_role_assignment" "example" {
  principal_role = polaris_principal_role.data_engineer.name
  catalog        = polaris_catalog_role.reader.catalog
  catalog_role   = polaris_catalog_role.reader.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `catalog` (String) The name of the catalog the catalog role belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `catalog_role` (String) The name of the catalog role to assign. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `principal_role` (String) The name of the principal role. Changing this forces a new resource.
